sentence: He is putting his shoes on.
Put your gloves on before you go out.
I will put on my new dress.

Put the book on the table.
I put the plate on the shelf.
He put his hand on my arm.
She put the key on the hook.
Put the picture on the wall.
I put my foot on the step.
They put a cover on the bed.
We put the cloth on the table.
Put the butter on the bread.
I put the stamp on the letter.
He put a ring on her finger.
I put off my work till tomorrow.
He is putting off the talk.
Do not put off your learning.
I put the cat out of the room.
He put out a new book.
He put up a new building.
We put our friend up for the night.
He put the box down on the floor.
I put my name down on the paper.
Put the key in the lock.
I put the letter in the box.
She put the milk in the cup.
He put his hand in his pocket.
Put the flower in the pot.
They put the money in the bank.
She put in a good word for me.
He put the wire in the hole.
Put the wire through the hole.
I put the thread through the needle.
Put me through to the office.
They put the work through quickly.
Put the cover over the pot.
I put my coat over the seat.
She put an umbrella over her head.
He put a cloth over the table.
Put your hand over your mouth.
They put a roof over the house.
She took the ring off her finger.
He is taking off his hat.
Take the cover off the bed.
I took the book off the shelf.
She took the skin off the orange.
I took the picture off the wall.
Take your hand off the table.
Take the book out of the box.
I took the key out of my pocket.
Take the milk out of the cup.
I took her out for a meal.
They took the money out of the bank.
Take the seed out of the fruit.
Take in what I am saying.
They took in a friend for the night.
I took back what I said.
Take this key back to the office.
She took the key away from him.
I went in the wrong way.
She went in without a key.
The key goes in the lock.
I went out to the street.
She went out for a walk.
Go out and get some air.
They went out of the town.
I went out with a friend.
She went out the back door.
She went on with the story.
Go on, I am hearing you.
They went on with the journey.
The meeting went on for hours.
Go on with what you were saying.
The train went on through the night.
He went off to the station.
I go off to work every morning.
She went off without a word.
The train goes off at six.
I went up to the door.
Go up and see the room.
He went up in the lift.
Smoke went up from the fire.
I went down to the station.
Go down and get the key.
He went down on his knees.
She went back to the store.
Go back and get the key.
I went back to my work.
She went through a hard time.
I went through all my money.
I went over to see her.
Go with me to the store.
She goes with him to work.
Go without food for a day.
Come in and have a seat.
I came out of the house.
She came out to see me.
The book came out last year.
He came out of the water.
I came back from the station.
He came back with the key.
Come up and see the room.
He came up with an idea.
He came down from the tree.
He came through a hard time.
The light came through the window.
I came across an old friend.
She came across a new idea.
He came across a strange thing.
I came across the book in the store.
Get up and go to the door.
They got up from the table.
She got in through the window.
The train gets in at six.
I got out of the train.
She got out at the station.
They got out of the house.
She got on with her work.
I got back from the station.
Get the book back from her.
He gave back what he took.
The flower gives off a sweet smell.
The meat gives off a bad smell.
I gave in to her request.
Do not give in to fear.
They gave in to the force.
They made up after the fight.
I cannot make out the writing.
Can you make out the picture?
She made off into the night.
The boy made off with the cake.
They made off before I saw them.
They kept on through the night.
I keep off the street at night.
I keep up with the news.
I kept the baby in the room.
He was kept in after school.
She kept out of the fight.
He sent out a call for help.
She sent him off to school.
I sent off for the book.
Send him back to his room.
See him off at the station.
She saw the boy off to school.
See me off at the door.
We went to see her off.
She has on a new dress.
Have them in for a meal.
They did up the old house.
I could do with a drink.
She could do with some help.
He could do with a rest.
I cannot do with this noise.
What do you do with this?
Do without food for a day.
I will give you an answer.
We give answers to all questions.
I have a desire for food.
She has a desire for knowledge.
He had a desire to go.
Have you a desire for more?
I have no desire for that.
I had a look at the book.
She has a look at the picture.
Have a look through the window.
I will do the work tomorrow.
Make a comparison between the two.
We make comparisons all the time.
I give help to my friend.
She gave help to the old man.
I have a belief in him.
He had no belief in the plan.
I have belief in the future.
She made an attempt to go.
I have a fear of fire.
He had a fear of the dark.
I have a fear of falling.
They have fears about the future.
She made a change to the plan.
I give an offer of help.
He gives an offer every time.
The rain has an effect on the earth.
This had an effect on me.
She has a great effect on him.
The change had a good effect.
I make use of the library.
She made good use of the time.
Make use of what you have.
He makes use of every chance.
We made use of the old building.
I will make use of this.
He had no knowledge of the plan.
I have little knowledge of it.
I do my reading at night.
I do my writing in the morning.
He did the writing for the group.
Do your writing before you go.
We do our writing at the office.
She made a request for help.
He makes a request every day.
I give attention to the road.
She gave attention to the details.
I make a start on the work.
He makes a start every morning.
I will make a start tomorrow.
I have a feeling of joy.
Have you a feeling about this?
Give your support to the plan.
I give support to my friend.
She gave support to the cause.
Give support when it is needed.
I did harm to the plant.
Do not do harm to yourself.
I will make a discovery one day.
She gave the order to go.
They gave the order to stop.
I make a journey every year.
Make a journey to the north.
He makes the journey by train.
I will make a journey soon.
I have love for my family.
She has love in her heart.
He had no love for the work.
I have a deep love for music.
I do business in the town.
I made a move to the door.
She makes a move every time.
She gives a push to the box.
They gave the cart a push.
This is my room. The door is in the wall.
My bed is against the wall under the window.
I put my books on the table between the bed and the door.
A picture is on the wall over the books.
I take the cover off my bed and put it on a seat.
The window is wide and the room is bright.
I keep my key on the table by the door.
I get up from my bed and go to the window.
Put the box in the drawer under the table.
I see a bird through the window.
Some food is on the table.
I take my spoon in my hand and put the soup in my mouth.
I put salt on my meat and take butter on my bread.
The taste of sugar is sweet. This cake is good.
I take the skin off the orange.
Come to the table. The meal is ready.
Give me some milk and a cup for the meal.
She made a cake and put it on the plate.
I have bread and butter every morning.
Put the bottle on the table before the meal.
I go to my office in a train.
I get a ticket at the station.
I give a ticket to my friend and put the other in my pocket.
Here is my train. The front is not full.
The porter gives the bag to me.
I put the bag across the seat.
I get off the train at my station.
This is the road to the station.
I go with a friend to the station every day.
Take your ticket from your pocket.
This is my body. I have a head, two arms, and two legs.
I put my right hand on my head.
I take my right hand off my head.
My mouth is between my nose and my chin.
I have a tongue in my mouth.
This finger is bent. That finger is straight.
My ears are at the sides of my head.
I am able to see with my eyes.
Put your hand on your heart.
Take a deep breath and let it go out.
The weather is warm in the summer.
In the winter the weather is cold.
Rain is wet. It is water from the sky.
In wet weather I get an umbrella and put it over my head.
In the winter I see my breath in the cold air.
I take some snow in my hands and make a ball.
A cold wind comes from the north.
After the rain the sun comes out.
Keep your coat on when the weather is cold.
My father is a man and my mother is a woman.
I have one sister and one brother.
My brother is very young. He is still a baby.
I get some milk for my baby brother.
A kiss and a smile make a baby ready for play.
My family is healthy. The old and the young are together.
She put the baby down and took her in her arms.
My mother comes to the room with a book in her hand.
The father gave his son a kiss on the head.
I go to the store on the street.
I get some bread and butter at the store.
I put the bread in my bag and go back to my house.
The store is near my house, not far from the station.
I take money from my pocket and give it to the man.
He gives me the food and I put it in my bag.
After the store I go to the office in a train.
I keep my ticket in my pocket all day.
At the end of the day I get on the train and go home.
I take off my coat and put it on the bed.
I will make a decision about it.
She made a decision to go.
I have a desire for food.
She has a desire to see the film.
Do you have a desire to go with us?
I will give you an answer tomorrow.
She made a request for more time.
I have a need for a coat.
Do you have a need for help?
She gave attention to the story.
I have a belief in the future.
He has a belief in hard work.
Make a comparison between the two.
She made a comparison of the prices.
Take a look at this picture.
Have a look at the book.
He took a long look at the map.
Make a start on the work.
She made a start on the cake.
Come to a stop at the door.
The train came to a stop.
She gave help to the old man.
I have no thoughts on this.
Do you have thoughts about it?
I have knowledge of the story.
Do you have knowledge of this?
I have a memory of that day.
She has a good memory of the event.
I have a feeling that he is right.
The shop has food and clothing.
I take a book from the shelf.
What is the price of this book?
I give the money to the man.
I put the book in my bag.
I go home from the shop.
I go to school every day.
The school is a large building.
I have a book and a pen.
I do my work with my pen.
The teacher says a new word.
I have a pain in my head.
My mother takes me to the doctor.
The doctor says I have a cold.
I have a pain in my throat.
The doctor gives me some medicine.
I take the medicine with water.
I go to bed and keep warm.
The house has four walls and a roof.
zh: 房子有四面墙和一个屋顶

sentence: The door is in the front wall.
There are two windows in my room.
I go in through the front door.
The table is in the middle of the room.
I put my books on the shelf by the door.
zh: 我把书放在门边的架子上

sentence: There is a garden by the house.
The dog has four legs and a tail.
zh: 狗有四条腿和一条尾巴

sentence: I give food to the dog every day.
The dog goes about the garden.
I see a bird in the tree.
A cat is on the wall.
I put some water out for the birds.
zh: 我放了一些水给鸟儿喝

sentence: The sky is blue and clear.
I see the sun through the window.
The rain comes down from the clouds.
After the rain the air is clean.
The wind goes through the trees.
I put on my coat when it is cold.
zh: 天冷的时候我穿上外套

sentence: In the spring the flowers come out.
The train is at the station.
I give my ticket to the man.
The train goes through the country.
I see the towns through the window.
I get off the train at the station.
I take my bag from the train.
I go to work every morning.
My work is in an office.
zh: 我的工作在一个办公室

sentence: I do my work with my hands.
I put my paper on the table.

zh: 我的朋友和我一起工作

sentence: I keep on with my work.
I go home from work in the evening.
The sun comes up in the morning.
I go to work in the morning.
I have my meal at midday.
The sun goes down in the evening.
At night I go to bed.
The news made me feel angry.
I give a smile to my friend.
I feel the heat of the fire.
I make a phone call to my friend.
I get the number from the book.
I put in the number and wait.
My friend says she is well.
I put down the phone after the talk.
I have some money in the bank.
I take my money from the bank.
The man at the bank gives me my money.
I put the money in my pocket.
I give money to the bank every month.
The bank keeps my money safe.
zh: 银行安全地保管我的钱

sentence: I go to the post office.
I have a letter to send.
I put a stamp on the letter.
I give the letter to the man.
The letter will go to my friend.
zh: 信会寄到我的朋友那里

sentence: I get a letter from my friend.
I put the letter in my bag.
The man cuts my hair with scissors.
zh: 那人用剪刀剪我的头发

sentence: The hair goes on the floor.
I see my face in the glass.
zh: 我在玻璃里看见我的脸

sentence: I give money to the man.
I ask the way to the station.
The man says go down this road.
He says go across the bridge.
I give the man my thanks.
I see the station after the bridge.
I see the fire in the house.
I put out the fire with water.
Go out of the house quickly.
I go out through the door.
I go to a restaurant and sit down.
The man gives me a list of food.
I say I want some meat and bread.
zh: 我说我要一些肉和面包

sentence: The man brings the food to the table.
I put some salt on the meat.
I give money to the man after the meal.
I see a coat in the shop.
zh: 我在商店看见一件外套

sentence: I say the price is too much.
The man says he will make the price low.
I give him the money and take the coat.
I go to a house and ask about a room.
zh: 我去一个房子问有没有房间

sentence: The woman takes me to a room.
zh: 那女士带我去看一个房间

sentence: The room has a bed and a table.
zh: 房间有一张床和一张桌子

sentence: I ask about the price of the room.
I give money for the room every month.
I put my things in the room.
I go to get a package from the post office.
I give my name to the man.
The man gets the package from the back.
I put my name on the paper.
I am ill today and can not go to work.
zh: 我今天病了，不能去上班

sentence: I send a message to my office.
zh: 我给办公室发了一个消息

sentence: I say I have a cold and need rest.
The man says I should go to the doctor.
zh: 那人说我应该去看医生

sentence: I take some medicine and go to bed.
I go to my friend and ask for a book.
zh: 我去朋友那里借一本书

sentence: My friend gives me the book.
I say I will give it back tomorrow.
I take the book home and read it.
I give the book back to my friend.
My friend gives me a gift.
I say thank you to my friend.
I give my friend a smile.

zh: 善意的话带来好的感觉

sentence: I am late for the meeting.
I say I am sorry to the group.
I say there was too much traffic.
The group says it is not a problem.
I keep our meeting in my mind for next time.
zh: 下次我会记住我们的约定时间

sentence: I give my ticket to the man at the gate.
I put my bag on the table for checking.
The plane takes off after an hour.
zh: 飞机一个小时后起飞了

sentence: I see the city from above through the window.
zh: 我从上面透过窗户看见城市

sentence: The plane comes down at the other airport.
zh: 飞机降落在另一个机场

sentence: I go to the hotel and ask for a room.
The man gives me a key and a room number.
zh: 那个人给了我一把钥匙和一个房间号

sentence: I put my things in the room.
The room has a bed and a bath.
zh: 房间有一间床和一个浴室

sentence: I give money to the man at the desk.
I sleep well at the hotel.
I go to the office for a job interview.
The man asks me some questions.
I say I have some experience in this work.
zh: 说我在这个工作有一些经验

sentence: The man says he will send me a message.
zh: 那人说他会给我发消息

sentence: I say thank you and go home.
I hope I get the work.
zh: 我希望我能得到这份工作

sentence: I have a new house and must move my things.
zh: 我有了新房子，必须搬东西

sentence: I put my books in a box.
My friend comes to help me.
We take the box to the new house.
zh: 我们把盒子搬到新房子

sentence: I put the box in the new room.
The new house is bigger than the old one.
My friend has a party at his house.
zh: 朋友在他家办了一个聚会

sentence: I go to the party with a gift.
There is food and music at the party.
I talk with my friends and have a good time.
zh: 我和朋友聊天，过得很开心

sentence: I say thank you to my friend and go home.
zh: 我对朋友说谢谢，回了家
